message:
feat(runtime,style): add reentrant-safe combine_with owner tracking and fix stylesheet extend deadlock

Runtime (flat_combine.rs):
- Track the owning thread during combine_with callbacks via a new
  combine_with_owner Mutex<Option<ThreadId>> field. This prevents
  reentrant deadlocks when a user callback submitted via combine_with
  itself tries to enqueue an op on the same combiner.
- CombineWithOwnerGuard RAII struct ensures the owner field is always
  cleared on drop, even if the callback panics.

Style (stylesheet.rs):
- Fix a potential deadlock in StyleSheet::extend where both the source
  and target locks were held simultaneously. Now clones the source
  styles under a read lock, drops that lock, then acquires the self
  write lock and extends — eliminating the lock-ordering hazard for
  bidirectional extend calls.
- Add concurrent_bidirectional_extend_completes test that exercises
  two threads extending each other's stylesheets simultaneously with
  a barrier and a 2-second timeout, verifying deadlock freedom.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
